mapper.update: UPDATE question_bank SET mistake_count = mistake_count + 1, mistake_rate = (mistake_count + 1) / (use_count + 1) * 100 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM question_bank WHERE use_count > 0 ORDER BY mistake_rate DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT DISTINCT subject_name FROM question_bank ORDER BY subject_name
SELECT DISTINCT question_type FROM question_bank ORDER BY question_type
SELECT DISTINCT knowledge_point FROM question_bank WHERE knowledge_point IS NOT NULL AND knowledge_point != '' ORDER BY knowledge_point
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO answer_records ( user_id, question_id, subject_name, question_type, category_level, knowledge_point, user_answer, correct_answer, is_correct, score, answer_time, mistake_added, exam_session, answer_date ) VALUES
( #{record.userId}, #{record.questionId}, #{record.subjectName}, #{record.questionType}, #{record.categoryLevel}, #{record.knowledgePoint}, #{record.userAnswer}, #{record.correctAnswer}, #{record.isCorrect}, #{record.score}, #{record.answerTime}, #{record.mistakeAdded}, #{record.examSession}, #{record.answerDate} )
